hypotheses.name: Bootstrap + spectral decay scan of SV regulatory subspaces
hypotheses.method: At L0/L1/L2/L8: SVD of centered nonzero embeddings [2039,512]. Compute residualized rbc (TRRUST pos vs neg pairwise distances, OLS co-expression residualization) for SV ranges SV2-4, SV5-7, SV8-10, SV11-14, SV15-20, SV21-30. Bootstrap validation: 100 rounds resample pos/neg edges with replacement for SV5-7 at L0.
hypotheses.result_value: mean=0.1466, 95%CI=[0.0842, 0.1987], frac_positive=1.000/1.000. Spectral decay: SV5-7 dominant at L0-L2; SV2-4 dominant at L8; SV8-14 weak at L8 only.
hypotheses.next_action: Use spectral decay map to characterize the full SV landscape. Test SV5-7 vs SV2-4 orthogonality: do they encode different aspects of regulatory structure?

hypotheses.name: TF→Target directional asymmetry in SV5-7
hypotheses.method: At each of 12 layers: SVD of centered nonzero embeddings, project to SV5-7 (3D). For each positive TRRUST edge (TF→target), compute signed displacement vector (target_coord - TF_coord). One-sample t-test per SV axis (H0: mean=0). Also SVD of displacement matrix for dominant-direction combined test.
hypotheses.result_value: L0: SV5 p=0.0036 d=0.120, SV6 p=0.0008 d=-0.139, SV7 p=0.0102 d=0.106. L8: p_combined<0.001. All 3 SV5-7 axes show consistent directional asymmetry at L0.
hypotheses.next_action: Test whether TF-role vs target-role is predictable from SV5-7 coordinates (logistic regression, AUROC). Check if the directionality aligns with known regulatory hierarchy depth.

hypotheses.name: SV1 loading vs TRRUST network degree
hypotheses.method: Compute TRRUST in/out/total degree for 2039 nonzero genes from cycle1_edge_dataset.tsv. Spearman correlation of |SV1 loading| (from iter_0049 h01_sv1_vectors.npy) vs total degree at each of 12 layers. Mann-Whitney test: circuit (degree>0, n=295) vs non-circuit (n=1744).
hypotheses.result_value: L0: rho=-0.086 (p<0.001), rbc_circuit=0.143 (p<0.001). L1: rho=-0.060 (p=0.007), rbc_circuit=0.102. L2+: not significant. Binary circuit membership > continuous degree as predictor.
hypotheses.next_action: Integrate SV1, SV5-7 and directionality into unified gene embedding characterization. Test if SV1+SV5-7 jointly classify TF identity vs target identity.
